title: Moderation Actions — 2026-04-20
body:
The moderation team has completed a review of the abuse queue. The following actions were taken in accordance with community guidelines:

• Two members were permanently banned for high-severity violations: a coordinated phishing spam campaign (6 channels, 20 minutes) and repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.

• Two members received formal warnings: one for an off-topic post in #introductions, and one for suspected automated behaviour in help channels (the latter account remains under review).

• Two reports were closed without action after review: one arose from a moderation disagreement and did not meet the threshold for sanction; the other was identified as a coordinated false-positive brigading attempt.

We do not publicly name sanctioned members. If you have questions or wish to appeal a decision, please open a ticket in #mod-appeals.

Thank you for helping keep this community safe.
